Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the workflow definition.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the workflow definition.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:(aws|aws-cn|aws-us-gov):nova-act:[a-z0-9-]+:[0-9]{12}:workflow-definition/[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{1,40}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp when the workflow definition was created.
CreatedAt.markdownDescription:
The timestamp when the workflow definition was created.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Description.description: An optional description of the workflow definition's purpose and functionality.
Description.markdownDescription:
An optional description of the workflow definition's purpose and functionality.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 4000  
Update requires: Replacement

Name.description: The name of the workflow definition. Must be unique within your account and region.
Name.markdownDescription:
The name of the workflow definition. Must be unique within your account and region.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 40  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{1,40}$  
Update requires: Replacement

Status.description: The current status of the workflow definition.
Status.markdownDescription:
The current status of the workflow definition.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: ACTIVE | DELETING  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

WorkflowExportConfig.description: Configuration settings for exporting workflow execution data and logs to Amazon S3.

S3BucketName.description: The name of the Amazon S3 bucket for exporting workflow data.
S3BucketName.markdownDescription:
The name of the Amazon S3 bucket for exporting workflow data.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 3  
Maximum Length: 63  
Pattern: ^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9.-]*[a-z0-9]$  
Update requires: No interruption

S3KeyPrefix.description: An optional prefix for Amazon S3 object keys to organize exported data.
S3KeyPrefix.markdownDescription:
An optional prefix for Amazon S3 object keys to organize exported data.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 100  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9!\-_.*'()]+(?:/[a-zA-Z0-9!\-_.*'()]+)*$  
Update requires: No interruption

WorkflowExportConfig.markdownDescription:
Configuration settings for exporting workflow execution data and logs to Amazon S3.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption
